title: Reports
subtitle: Operational, inventory, and financial reports for posted transactions.
snapshot_note: This report is based on the current stock snapshot.

groups.cash_flow_description: Cash and bank inflow and outflow reports.
groups.party_description: Customer and supplier balance movement reports.
groups.operations_description: Operational sales and purchase line reports.
groups.inventory_description: Current stock, valuation, and movement reports.
groups.management_description: User activity and operational oversight reports.

table.no_data: No report data found for the selected filters.

messages.ledger_required: Select a ledger to view this report.
messages.customer_required: Select a customer to view this statement.
messages.supplier_required: Select a supplier to view this statement.
messages.account_required: Select a cash or bank account to view this report.

trial_balance.label: Trial balance
trial_balance.description: Posted debit, credit, and net balance by ledger.

balance_sheet.label: Balance sheet
balance_sheet.description: Financial position up to the selected date.

income_statement.label: Profit and loss
income_statement.description: Revenue, cost of goods sold, expenses, and net profit for the selected period.

receipt_report.label: Receipt report
receipt_report.description: Cash and bank inflows where the cash account is debited.

payment_report.label: Payment report
payment_report.description: Cash and bank outflows where the cash account is credited.

cash_book.label: Cash book
cash_book.description: Running balance for a selected cash or bank account.

sales_report.label: Sales report
sales_report.description: Posted sales lines by customer and item.

purchase_report.label: Purchase report
purchase_report.description: Posted purchase lines by supplier and item.

inventory_stock.label: Inventory stock
inventory_stock.description: Current stock quantity and value by item and warehouse.

stock_movement.label: Stock movement
stock_movement.description: Detailed stock movement history by item and warehouse.

low_stock.label: Low stock
low_stock.description: Items at or below their reorder level.

inventory_valuation.label: Inventory valuation
inventory_valuation.description: Current inventory value grouped by item.

user_activity.label: User activity
user_activity.description: Logins and create, update, and delete activity by user.
